summary: EXP-488 proposes adding a closure_note field to ISS-2218 (closed-issues.json) acknowledging that EXP-438's visible-rationale strategy closes the audit-trail concern (placement is intentional+signposted) but does NOT restore narrative flow (tab 8 still inserts methodology critique between two falsification tabs). Pattern matches existing closure_note usage on ISS-1933/1934/1935 and ISS-2243. Decider action: one additive-field edit to closed-issues.json (no status/fixed_by/fixed_at change), no build needed (closed-issues.json is not rendered into docs/index.html). Then close ISS-2311 as resolved-by-EXP-488. Note: this is the LAST of the SEC-overview-timestamp-reading-guide.c1 holes (holes 1/3/4/5 closed by EXP-513 commit 819cb05; hole 2 OBE-closed by EXP-517).
